testcase.name: SC-01-T03 · P03 AI 4 步流水线 SSE 推送 + fallback + cancel › AC1-4 · happy path · 4 步流水线 wait→now→done + JSON 流式 + DONE → nav P04
SC-01-T03 · P03 AI 4 步流水线 SSE 推送 + fallback + cancel › AC5 · TC-01.03 · qwen timeout → FALLBACK_MODEL → 黄条 + model badge switch
SC-01-T03 · P03 AI 4 步流水线 SSE 推送 + fallback + cancel › AC6 · cancel button → POST /cancel → nav P-HOME (/)
SC-01-T03 · P03 AI 4 步流水线 SSE 推送 + fallback + cancel › TI3 · pipeline step order strict: step N done before step N+1 starts
SC-01-T03 · P03 AI 4 步流水线 SSE 推送 + fallback + cancel › alias testids render alongside canonical testids
SC-01-T03 · P03 AI 4 步流水线 SSE 推送 + fallback + cancel › FAIL events: 2x FAIL triggers fallback to /manual-entry
SC-01-T03 · P03 AI 4 步流水线 SSE 推送 + fallback + cancel › a11y: pipeline has aria-live=polite, active step has aria-busy
